final_answer: ESCALATE. The action cannot proceed as the evidence chain fails to meet the pre-change callback source requirement mandated by STD-QUA-071-P. The source boundary remains open, blocking payment release until this critical pre-change gate is satisfied.
open_blockers: Payment release blocked until pre-change gate closes
